_note: Synthetic agency configuration for the hackathon demo. Represents the 'do we serve this zip / what are our hours / how do people reach us' facts the Eligibility Agent and Voice Agent need independent of any single caregiver's assignment. Service area is derived from the union of data/synthetic/caregiver_roster.json zips plus a couple extra, but is stored as its own agency-level fact per PROJECT.md's Agency Configuration Data model.
